faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

q1.question: Is the website really delivered in 6 hours?
q1.answer: Yes. Once we receive your content, our team starts immediately. Most websites are delivered the same day. If we can't meet the deadline, you don't pay.

q2.question: How does the process work step by step?
q2.answer:
1. Fill out the contact form below — tell us as much as you can about your business and what you need.
2. We get back to you within 24 hours. We'll send you a short intake form to gather the details (business info, content, branding) — or we can hop on a quick call if you prefer.
3. You send us your content (text, images, logo) via email — we help if you don't have everything ready.
4. We build your website and send you a preview.
5. You review it and request changes if needed — one revision round is free.
6. Once you're happy, you pay and we go live.

q3.question: What if I don't like the result?
q3.answer: Every plan includes a free revision round. We'll adjust the design, layout, or content until you're happy. Your satisfaction is guaranteed before payment.

q4.question: What if I need a booking system, online payments, or a custom solution?
q4.answer: We build it. Just tell us what you need — we'll take care of the rest.

q5.question: What technology does the website run on?
q5.answer:
The same technology trusted by Apple, Netflix, Spotify, Airbnb, and Porsche. Your site is fully encrypted, loads instantly worldwide, and has 99.99% uptime.

For the technically curious: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, Radix UI, Bun — hosted on Vercel's global edge network, with Neon serverless database and Supabase backend services.

q6.question: Will my site show up on Google?
q6.answer: Yes. Every site we build is optimized for search engines — fast loading, mobile-friendly, and properly structured. These are the key factors Google uses to rank websites.

q7.question: What happens after my website goes live?
q7.answer: We set up everything for you — hosting, security, encryption, global performance. You own your website fully, and if you ever need anything, we're just a message away.

q8.question: Do I really only pay after delivery?
q8.answer: Yes — we only ask for a small 10% deposit upfront, just as a confirmation. The rest you pay after you've seen the result and you're happy with it.

q9.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q9.answer: Bank transfer, online card payment, or cash. Simple, secure, no hassle.

footer.description: Secure, modern websites for small businesses — delivered within 6 hours. Only pay after delivery.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Budapest Labs ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how we protect it.

collection.title: What data we collect
collection.content: When you submit our contact form, we collect: your name, email address, phone number (optional), business name (optional), selected plan, and your message. We do not collect any data automatically — no cookies, no tracking scripts, no analytics.

purpose.title: Why we collect it
purpose.content: We use your contact information solely to respond to your inquiry and deliver our web development services. We never sell, share, or transfer your data to third parties.

storage.title: How we store it
storage.content: Your data is stored securely on encrypted servers within the European Union. We retain your information only as long as necessary to fulfill your request and comply with legal obligations.

hosting.title: Website hosting
hosting.content: This website is hosted on infrastructure that uses HTTPS encryption for all connections. No personal data is logged by the hosting provider beyond standard server access logs, which are automatically deleted after 30 days.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.content: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a copy of the data we hold about you.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any privacy-related questions or requests, email us at info@budapestlabs.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Budapest Labs' services, you agree to the following terms.

scope.title: Scope of services
scope.content: Budapest Labs provides website design and development services for small businesses. Our service includes design, development, deployment, and initial hosting setup as described in the selected plan.

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: You do not pay anything upfront. We build your website, you review it, and you only pay if you are satisfied with the result. Payment is due upon approval of the final deliverable. We accept bank transfer, online card payment, and cash.

revisions.title: Revisions
revisions.content: Every plan includes one round of free revisions. Additional revision rounds may be subject to additional fees, which will be communicated in advance.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.content: We aim to deliver all projects within 6 hours of receiving your content. If we cannot meet this deadline, you are not obligated to pay.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.content: Upon full payment, you own the website and all its content. We retain no rights to your site. You are free to move, modify, or take down your website at any time.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.content: Budapest Labs is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the service.

law.title: Governing law
law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Hungary. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts of Budapest.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: We make every effort to keep the information on this website accurate and up to date. However, we accept no liability for the completeness or accuracy of the content.
